x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Virtual Agent topics for legal enable conversational AI self-service for common legal requests. Existing topic coverage indicates readiness to activate Now Assist conversational capabilities and AI Agents for legal intake.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Build Virtual Agent conversation topics for common legal requests.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cba
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Virtual Agent topics for legal enable conversational AI self-service for common legal requests. Existing topic coverage indicates readiness to activate Now Assist conversational capabilities and AI Agents for legal intake.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Legal Virtual Agent Topics</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sys_cs_topic");
ga.addQuery("name","CONTAINS","legal");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=3)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" topics",finding:c+" legal VA topics found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" topics",finding:c+" legal VA topic(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 topics",finding:"No legal Virtual Agent topics found."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>LSD</module>
<number>CHK0006222</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Build Virtual Agent conversation topics for common legal requests.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cba</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
